specific_question: By Q2 2025, had Isabella’s team collaborated with IT to test new KM system features for employee training?
answer: Yes. An internal update on February 12, 2025, confirms the KM and IT teams conducted feature testing for upcoming system updates.
dr_question: How can MediConn Solutions strengthen its knowledge management system by Q3 2026 to help virtual care teams prevent knowledge-related errors that are shown to be a leading cause of medical errors.
